_comment: Conservative-scenario projections derived from baseline-metrics.json. See analysis/before-after-model.md for the full derivation and assumptions list.
assumptions: Baseline conversion rate is sub-2 percent, the regime in which signal densification produces meaningful Smart Bidding gains.
Tier 1 audience size is between 5 and 15 percent of the scored user universe.
Average order value held constant at the trailing-six-month median; AOV expansion is not credited to this initiative.
Smart Bidding takes 14 days to fully integrate the densified signal; reported uplift excludes the integration window.
Industry benchmark range for offline-conversion-densified Smart Bidding: 5-18 percent CPA reduction. Conservative scenario uses the lower bound.
USD to SEK conversion at 10.5 SEK per USD; FX volatility absorbed into the conservative buffer.
Recurring infrastructure cost is dominated by BigQuery on-demand pricing; storage and Cloud Run are negligible at this scale.
No incremental media spend; uplift is held to be efficiency-only on the existing budget.
